{{CargoOrgan
|name=Laplace's Demon Core
|type=Common
|rank=red
|id=10921
|idx=132
|description="Sealed by Einstein despite knowing all universal particle states across time. Turns out precognition doesn't help when your opponent can yeet you into a physics paradox."
—Superbrain Files
|skill=
|hp=3090
|def=231
|atk=296
|rush=234
|gene1=The Pond has a +12% chance to produce W-tads
|gene2=Fungus Farm: +12%chance to produce
Wonder Fungi
|gene3=Lumber Camp produces Ancient Wood by +12%
|gene4=Quarry produces Ancient Fossil by +12%
|gene5=The Time Machine: +12% chance to drop
Time Chests
|gene6=Home Facility Resource Max Cap +5%
|gene7=All Rocket Cabin production +4% (Awakened)
|}}
